jobs.title: Global Wealth Management – Consulente alla Clientela / Private Banker
jobs.description: Global Wealth Management – Consulente alla Clientela / Private Banker at Banca del Sempione, a Swiss private bank headquartered in Lugano (Ticino). descriptionByLocale.en: Global Wealth Management – Client Consultant / Private Banker at Banca del Sempione, a Swiss private bank headquartered in Lugano (Ticino). The Role: As part of our Global Wealth Management team, we are looking for a Private Banker with an international vision, able to manage clients with global needs and offer customized financial solutions. descriptionByLocale.fr: Gestion de la Richesse Mondiale – Conseiller en Clientèle / Private Banker chez Banca del Sempione, une banque privée suisse basée à Lugano (Ticino).
